overview: Lightweight JUCE-based audio plugin host. Lives in the system tray (Windows) or menu bar (macOS/Linux), runs VST/VST3/AU plugins in series through a JUCE AudioProcessorGraph, persists chain order + plugin state + audio device settings between launches. No permanent main window — all interaction is through the tray icon and an on-demand Preferences window.
graph:
HostStartup.cpp -> IconMenu (owns single instance for app lifetime)
IconMenu -> PluginWindow (opens/closes plugin editor windows)
IconMenu -> PreferencesWindow (settings UI; staged-then-Apply)
IconMenu -> AudioProcessorGraph + AudioDeviceManager + AudioProcessorPlayer (realtime audio chain)
IconMenu::PluginLoadThread -> AudioPluginFormatManager (background plugin instantiation, marshalled back via MessageManager::callAsync)
PreferencesWindow content -> AudioChainListComponent (paint-based drag-reorder + bypass + Edit list)
PreferencesWindow content -> onApply callback -> IconMenu::applyPluginChain
CMakeLists.txt -> lib/juce (vendored JUCE 8) + lib/vstsdk2.4 (VST2 SDK, non-Windows)
